1204	          eventName: trackWorkout.workout.name,
1205	          scheme: trackWorkout.workout.scheme,
1206	          rank,
1207	          points,
1208	          rawScore: String(score.scoreValue ?? ""),
1209	          formattedScore,
1210	          formattedTiebreak,
1211	          penaltyType: (score.penaltyType as "minor" | "major") ?? null,
1212	          penaltyPercentage: score.penaltyPercentage ?? null,
1213	          isDirectlyModified:
1214	            score.verificationStatus === "adjusted" && !score.penaltyType,
1215	          videoUrl: isEventDivisionPublished(trackWorkout.id, divisionId)
1216	            ? (videoMap.get(
1217	                `${registration.registration.id}:${trackWorkout.id}`,
1218	              )?.url ?? null)
1219	            : null,
1220	          videoSubmissionId: isEventDivisionPublished(
1221	            trackWorkout.id,
1222	            divisionId,
1223	          )
1224	            ? (videoMap.get(
1225	                `${registration.registration.id}:${trackWorkout.id}`,
1226	              )?.submissionId ?? null)
1227	            : null,
1228	          parentEventId: trackWorkout.parentEventId,
1229	          parentEventName: trackWorkout.parentEventId
1230	            ? (parentNameMap.get(trackWorkout.parentEventId) ?? null)
1231	            : null,
1232	          isParentEvent: false,
1233	          cappedRoundCount: roundSummary.cappedRoundCount,
1234	          totalRoundCount: roundSummary.totalRoundCount,
1235	          reviewSummary: buildReviewSummary(
1236	            registration.registration.id,
1237	            trackWorkout.id,
1238	          ),
1239	        })
1240	
1241	        entry.totalPoints += points
1242	      }
1243	
1244	      // Athletes registered in this division who didn't submit a score for
1245	      // this event tie at the worst position (activeCount + 1). Without this,
1246	      // an absent submission would have totalPoints = 0 and outrank a
1247	      // recorded submission under lower-is-better algorithms (online).
1248	      const activeCount = eventScoreInputs.filter(
1249	        (s) => s.status === "scored" || s.status === "cap",
1250	      ).length
1251	      const missingPlace = activeCount + 1
1252	      const missingPoints = Math.round(
1253	        calculatePointsForPlace({
1254	          place: missingPlace,
1255	          config: scoringConfig,
1256	        }) * multiplier,
1257	      )
1258	
1259	      const scoredUserIds = new Set(divisionScores.map((s) => s.userId))
1260	      const missingRegs = filteredRegistrations.filter(
1261	        (r) =>
1262	          (r.registration.divisionId || "open") === divisionId &&
1263	          !scoredUserIds.has(r.user.id),
1264	      )
1265	
1266	      for (const reg of missingRegs) {
1267	        const entry = leaderboardMap.get(reg.registration.id)
1268	        if (!entry) continue
1269	
1270	        const eventDivPublished = isEventDivisionPublished(
1271	          trackWorkout.id,
1272	          divisionId,
1273	        )
1274	        const videoInfo = videoMap.get(
1275	          `${reg.registration.id}:${trackWorkout.id}`,
1276	        )
1277	
1278	        entry.eventResults.push({
1279	          trackWorkoutId: trackWorkout.id,
1280	          trackOrder: trackWorkout.trackOrder,
1281	          eventName: trackWorkout.workout.name,
1282	          scheme: trackWorkout.workout.scheme,
1283	          rank: missingPlace,
1284	          points: missingPoints,
1285	          rawScore: null,
1286	          formattedScore: "N/A",
1287	          formattedTiebreak: null,
1288	          penaltyType: null,
1289	          penaltyPercentage: null,
1290	          isDirectlyModified: false,
1291	          videoUrl: eventDivPublished ? (videoInfo?.url ?? null) : null,
1292	          videoSubmissionId: eventDivPublished
1293	            ? (videoInfo?.submissionId ?? null)
1294	            : null,
1295	          parentEventId: trackWorkout.parentEventId,
1296	          parentEventName: trackWorkout.parentEventId
1297	            ? (parentNameMap.get(trackWorkout.parentEventId) ?? null)
1298	            : null,
1299	          isParentEvent: false,
1300	          cappedRoundCount: 0,
1301	          totalRoundCount: 0,
1302	          reviewSummary: buildReviewSummary(
1303	            reg.registration.id,
1304	            trackWorkout.id,
1305	          ),
1306	        })
1307	
1308	        entry.totalPoints += missingPoints
1309	      }
1310	
1311	      processed++
1312	    }
1313	
1314	    eventProcessingLog.push({
1315	      trackWorkoutId: trackWorkout.id,
1316	      eventName: trackWorkout.workout.name,
1317	      eventStatus: trackWorkout.eventStatus ?? null,
1318	      scoresInDivisionMap: scoresSeenForEvent - scoresMissingRegistration,
1319	      divisionsWithScores: eventScoresByDivision.size,
1320	      divisionsGatedOut: gatedOut,
1321	      divisionsProcessed: processed,
1322	    })
1323	
1324	    // Add empty results for athletes who didn't complete this event
1325	    for (const [regId, entry] of leaderboardMap) {
1326	      const hasResult = entry.eventResults.some(
1327	        (er) => er.trackWorkoutId === trackWorkout.id,
1328	      )
1329	      if (!hasResult) {
1330	        entry.eventResults.push({
1331	          trackWorkoutId: trackWorkout.id,
1332	          trackOrder: trackWorkout.trackOrder,
1333	          eventName: trackWorkout.workout.name,
1334	          scheme: trackWorkout.workout.scheme,
1335	          rank: 0,
1336	          points: 0,
1337	          rawScore: null,
1338	          formattedScore: "N/A",
1339	          formattedTiebreak: null,
1340	          penaltyType: null,
1341	          penaltyPercentage: null,
1342	          isDirectlyModified: false,
1343	          videoUrl: isEventDivisionPublished(trackWorkout.id, entry.divisionId)
1344	            ? (videoMap.get(`${regId}:${trackWorkout.id}`)?.url ?? null)
1345	            : null,
1346	          videoSubmissionId: isEventDivisionPublished(
1347	            trackWorkout.id,
1348	            entry.divisionId,
1349	          )
1350	            ? (videoMap.get(`${regId}:${trackWorkout.id}`)?.submissionId ??
1351	              null)
1352	            : null,
1353	          parentEventId: trackWorkout.parentEventId,
1354	          parentEventName: trackWorkout.parentEventId
1355	            ? (parentNameMap.get(trackWorkout.parentEventId) ?? null)
1356	            : null,
1357	          isParentEvent: false,
1358	          cappedRoundCount: 0,
1359	          totalRoundCount: 0,
1360	          reviewSummary: isEventDivisionPublished(
1361	            trackWorkout.id,
1362	            entry.divisionId,
1363	          )
1364	            ? buildReviewSummary(regId, trackWorkout.id)
1365	            : null,
1366	        })
1367	      }
1368	    }
1369	  }
1370	
1371	  // Parent events are not scored directly — sub-events appear as top-level columns
1372	  // on the leaderboard, so we skip adding parent aggregate entries to eventResults.
1373	
1374	  const totalScoresProcessed = eventProcessingLog.reduce(
1375	    (sum, e) => sum + e.scoresInDivisionMap,
1376	    0,
1377	  )
1378	  const totalDivisionsGated = eventProcessingLog.reduce(
1379	    (sum, e) => sum + e.divisionsGatedOut,
1380	    0,
1381	  )
1382	
1383	  logInfo({
1384	    message: "[Leaderboard] Event processing breakdown",
1385	    attributes: {
1386	      competitionId: params.competitionId,
1387	      divisionId: params.divisionId ?? null,
1388	      totalScoresProcessed,
1389	      totalDivisionsGatedByPublishFilter: totalDivisionsGated,
1390	      perEvent: eventProcessingLog,
1391	    },
1392	  })
1393	
1394	  // Convert to array and apply tiebreakers for overall ranking
1395	  const leaderboard = Array.from(leaderboardMap.values())
1396	
1397	  // Group by division for ranking
1398	  const divisionGroups = new Map<string, CompetitionLeaderboardEntry[]>()
1399	  for (const entry of leaderboard) {
1400	    const existing = divisionGroups.get(entry.divisionId) || []
1401	    existing.push(entry)
1402	    divisionGroups.set(entry.divisionId, existing)
1403	  }
1404	
1405	  // Apply tiebreakers within each division
1406	  for (const [_divisionId, entries] of divisionGroups) {
1407	    // Build event placements map for tiebreaker
1408	    const tiebreakerInput: TiebreakerInput = {
1409	      athletes: entries.map((e) => ({
1410	        userId: e.userId,
1411	        totalPoints: e.totalPoints,
1412	        eventPlacements: new Map(
1413	          e.eventResults
1414	            .filter((er) => er.rank > 0)
1415	            .map((er) => [er.trackWorkoutId, er.rank]),
1416	        ),
1417	      })),
1418	      config: scoringConfig.tiebreaker,
1419	      scoringAlgorithm: scoringConfig.algorithm,
1420	    }
1421	
1422	    const rankedAthletes = applyTiebreakers(tiebreakerInput)
1423	
1424	    // Update entries with final ranks
1425	    for (const ranked of rankedAthletes) {
1426	      const entry = entries.find((e) => e.userId === ranked.userId)
1427	      if (entry) {
1428	        entry.overallRank = ranked.rank
1429	      }
1430	    }
1431	  }
1432	
1433	  // Sort by overall rank
1434	  const sortedEntries = leaderboard.sort((a, b) => {
1435	    // First by division, then by rank
1436	    if (a.divisionId !== b.divisionId) {
1437	      return a.divisionId.localeCompare(b.divisionId)
1438	    }
1439	    return a.overallRank - b.overallRank
1440	  })
1441	
1442	  // Build events list for the response — exclude parent events since sub-events
1443	  // appear as top-level columns on the leaderboard
1444	  const events = filteredTrackWorkouts
1445	    .filter((tw) => !childEventIds.has(tw.id))
1446	    .map((tw) => ({
1447	      trackWorkoutId: tw.id,
1448	      name: tw.workout.name,
1449	      parentEventId: tw.parentEventId,
1450	      parentEventName: tw.parentEventId
1451	        ? (parentNameMap.get(tw.parentEventId) ?? null)
1452	        : null,
1453	      isParentEvent: false,
1454	    }))
1455	
1456	  return {
1457	    entries: sortedEntries,
1458	    scoringConfig,
1459	    events,
1460	  }
1461	}
1462	
1463	/**
1464	 * Get leaderboard for a specific event
1465	 */
1466	export async function getEventLeaderboard(params: {
1467	  competitionId: string
1468	  trackWorkoutId: string
1469	  divisionId?: string
1470	}): Promise<EventLeaderboardEntry[]> {
1471	  // Get full leaderboard
1472	  const { entries } = await getCompetitionLeaderboard({
1473	    competitionId: params.competitionId,
1474	    divisionId: params.divisionId,
1475	  })
1476	
1477	  // Extract event results for the specific track workout
1478	  const eventResults: EventLeaderboardEntry[] = []
1479	
1480	  for (const entry of entries) {
1481	    const eventResult = entry.eventResults.find(
1482	      (er) => er.trackWorkoutId === params.trackWorkoutId,
1483	    )
1484	    if (eventResult && eventResult.rank > 0) {
1485	      eventResults.push({
1486	        registrationId: entry.registrationId,
1487	        userId: entry.userId,
1488	        athleteName: entry.athleteName,
1489	        divisionId: entry.divisionId,
1490	        divisionLabel: entry.divisionLabel,
1491	        rank: eventResult.rank,
1492	        points: eventResult.points,
1493	        rawScore: eventResult.rawScore,
1494	        formattedScore: eventResult.formattedScore,
1495	        isTimeCapped: eventResult.formattedScore.includes("cap"),
1496	      })
1497	    }
1498	  }
1499	
1500	  // Sort by rank
1501	  return eventResults.sort((a, b) => a.rank - b.rank)
1502	}
1503

content.content:
1	/**
2	 * Submission Verification Server Functions
3	 *
4	 * Server functions for organizers to view and verify athlete video submissions
5	 * for online competition events.
6	 */
7	
8	import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start"
9	import { and, desc, eq, inArray } from "drizzle-orm"
10	import { z } from "zod"
11	import { getDb } from "@/db"
12	import {
13	  competitionEventsTable,
14	  competitionRegistrationsTable,
15	} from "@/db/schemas/competitions"
16	import {
17	  programmingTracksTable,
18	  trackWorkoutsTable,
19	} from "@/db/schemas/programming"
20	import { scalingLevelsTable } from "@/db/schemas/scaling"
21	import {
22	  scoreRoundsTable,
23	  scoresTable,
24	  scoreVerificationLogsTable,
25	} from "@/db/schemas/scores"
26	import { userTable } from "@/db/schemas/users"
27	import { videoSubmissionsTable } from "@/db/schemas/video-submissions"
28	import type { TiebreakScheme } from "@/db/schemas/workouts"
29	import { workouts } from "@/db/schemas/workouts"
30	import { getEvlog } from "@/lib/evlog"
31	import { logInfo } from "@/lib/logging"
32	import {
33	  computeSortKey,
34	  decodeScore,
35	  encodeRounds,
36	  encodeScore,
37	  getDefaultScoreType,
38	  type ScoreType,
39	  sortKeyToString,
40	  type WorkoutScheme,
41	} from "@/lib/scoring"
42	import { getSessionFromCookie } from "@/utils/auth"
43	import { autochunk } from "@/utils/batch-query"
44	import { requireSubmissionReviewAccess } from "@/utils/team-auth"
45	
46	// ============================================================================
47	// Helpers
48	// ============================================================================
49	
50	/**
51	 * Verify a track workout belongs to a competition.
52	 * First checks `competition_events` (events with submission windows configured).
53	 * Falls back to `track_workouts` → `programming_tracks` for sub-events or
54	 * events without submission windows.
55	 */
56	async function verifyEventBelongsToCompetition(
57	  db: ReturnType<typeof getDb>,
58	  competitionId: string,
59	  trackWorkoutId: string,
60	): Promise<{
61	  submissionOpensAt: string | null
62	  submissionClosesAt: string | null
63	}> {
64	  // Try competition_events first (has submission window data)
65	  const [competitionEvent] = await db
66	    .select({
67	      id: competitionEventsTable.id,
68	      submissionOpensAt: competitionEventsTable.submissionOpensAt,
69	      submissionClosesAt: competitionEventsTable.submissionClosesAt,
70	    })
71	    .from(competitionEventsTable)
72	    .where(
73	      and(
74	        eq(competitionEventsTable.competitionId, competitionId),
75	        eq(competitionEventsTable.trackWorkoutId, trackWorkoutId),
76	      ),
77	    )
78	    .limit(1)
79	
80	  if (competitionEvent) {
81	    return {
82	      submissionOpensAt: competitionEvent.submissionOpensAt,
83	      submissionClosesAt: competitionEvent.submissionClosesAt,
84	    }
85	  }
86	
87	  // Fall back: verify via track_workouts → programming_tracks → competitions
88	  const [trackEvent] = await db
89	    .select({ id: trackWorkoutsTable.id })
90	    .from(trackWorkoutsTable)
91	    .innerJoin(
92	      programmingTracksTable,
93	      eq(trackWorkoutsTable.trackId, programmingTracksTable.id),
94	    )
95	    .where(
96	      and(
97	        eq(trackWorkoutsTable.id, trackWorkoutId),
98	        eq(programmingTracksTable.competitionId, competitionId),
99	      ),
100	    )
101	    .limit(1)
102	
103	  if (!trackEvent) {
104	    throw new Error("Event not found in this competition")
105	  }
106	
107	  return { submissionOpensAt: null, submissionClosesAt: null }
108	}
109	
110	// ============================================================================
111	// Types
112	// ============================================================================
113	
114	export interface VerificationInfo {
115	  status: "verified" | "adjusted" | "invalid" | null
116	  verifiedAt: Date | null
117	  verifiedByName: string | null
118	  penaltyType: "minor" | "major" | null
119	  penaltyPercentage: number | null
120	  noRepCount: number | null
121	}
122	
123	export interface SubmissionDetail {
124	  id: string
125	  athlete: {
126	    userId: string
127	    firstName: string
128	    lastName: string
129	    email: string
130	    avatar: string | null
131	    divisionId: string | null
132	    divisionLabel: string
133	    teamName: string | null
134	    registrationId: string
135	  }
136	  score: {
137	    displayValue: string
138	    rawValue: number | null
139	    status: string
140	    tiebreakValue: string | null
141	    secondaryValue: number | null
142	  }
143	  verification: VerificationInfo
144	  videoUrl: string | null
145	  submittedAt: Date
146	  notes: string | null
147	}
148	
149	export interface EventDetails {
150	  id: string
151	  trackOrder: number
152	  workout: {
153	    id: string
154	    name: string
155	    description: string
156	    scheme: string
157	    scoreType: string | null
158	    timeCap: number | null
159	    roundsToScore: number | null
160	    repsPerRound: number | null
161	    tiebreakScheme: string | null
162	  }
163	  submissionWindow: {
164	    opensAt: string | null
165	    closesAt: string | null
166	  }
167	}
168	
169	export interface SubmissionListItem {
170	  id: string
171	  athleteName: string
172	  teamName: string | null
173	  divisionLabel: string
174	  hasVideo: boolean
175	  scoreDisplay: string
176	  status: string
177	}
178	
179	// ============================================================================
180	// Input Schemas
181	// ============================================================================
182	
183	const getSubmissionDetailInputSchema = z.object({
184	  competitionId: z.string().min(1),
185	  trackWorkoutId: z.string().min(1),
186	  scoreId: z.string().min(1),
187	})
188	
189	const getEventSubmissionsInputSchema = z.object({
190	  competitionId: z.string().min(1),
191	  trackWorkoutId: z.string().min(1),
192	})
193	
194	const getEventDetailsForVerificationInputSchema = z.object({
195	  competitionId: z.string().min(1),
196	  trackWorkoutId: z.string().min(1),
197	})
198	
199	const getVerificationLogsInputSchema = z.object({
200	  scoreId: z.string().min(1),
201	  competitionId: z.string().min(1),
202	})
203	
204	export interface VerificationLogEntry {
205	  id: string
206	  action: string
207	  performedByName: string
208	  performedAt: Date
209	  originalScoreValue: number | null
210	  originalStatus: string | null
211	  newScoreValue: number | null
212	  newStatus: string | null
213	  scheme: string | null
214	  penaltyType: string | null
215	  penaltyPercentage: number | null
216	  noRepCount: number | null
217	}
218	
219	const verifySubmissionScoreInputSchema = z.object({
220	  competitionId: z.string().min(1),
221	  trackWorkoutId: z.string().min(1),
222	  scoreId: z.string().min(1),
223	  action: z.enum(["verify", "adjust", "invalid"]),
224	  // Required only when action === "adjust"
225	  adjustedScore: z.string().optional(),
226	  adjustedRoundScores: z
227	    .array(
228	      z.object({
229	        roundNumber: z.number().int().min(1),
230	        score: z.string().min(1),
231	      }),
232	    )
233	    .optional(),
234	  adjustedScoreStatus: z.enum(["scored", "cap"]).optional(),
235	  secondaryScore: z.string().optional(),
236	  tieBreakScore: z.string().optional(),
237	  reviewerNotes: z.string().optional(),
238	  // Penalty fields (for "adjust" action with penalty)
239	  penaltyType: z.enum(["minor", "major"]).optional(),
240	  penaltyPercentage: z.number().min(0).max(100).optional(),
241	  noRepCount: z.number().int().min(0).optional(),
242	})
243	
244	// ============================================================================
245	// Server Functions
246	// ============================================================================
247	
248	/**
249	 * Verify or adjust a submitted competition score
250	 */
251	export const verifySubmissionScoreFn = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
252	  .inputValidator((data: unknown) =>
253	    verifySubmissionScoreInputSchema.parse(data),
254	  )
255	  .handler(
256	    async ({
257	      data,
258	    }): Promise<{ success: boolean; verificationStatus: string }> => {
259	      const db = getDb()
260	
261	      const session = await getSessionFromCookie()
262	      if (!session?.userId) {
263	        throw new Error("Not authenticated")
264	      }
265	
266	      await requireSubmissionReviewAccess(data.competitionId)
267	
268	      getEvlog()?.set({
269	        action:
270	          data.action === "verify"
271	            ? "verify_submission"
272	            : data.action === "adjust"
273	              ? "adjust_submission"
274	              : "reject_submission",
275	        verification: {
276	          competitionId: data.competitionId,
277	          scoreId: data.scoreId,
278	          trackWorkoutId: data.trackWorkoutId,
279	        },
280	      })
281	
282	      // Verify the event belongs to this competition
283	      await verifyEventBelongsToCompetition(
284	        db,
285	        data.competitionId,
286	        data.trackWorkoutId,
287	      )
288	
289	      // Load the score (including current values for audit log)
290	      const [score] = await db
291	        .select({
292	          id: scoresTable.id,
293	          userId: scoresTable.userId,
294	          scheme: scoresTable.scheme,
295	          scoreType: scoresTable.scoreType,
296	          tiebreakScheme: scoresTable.tiebreakScheme,
297	          timeCapMs: scoresTable.timeCapMs,
298	          scoreValue: scoresTable.scoreValue,
299	          status: scoresTable.status,
300	          secondaryValue: scoresTable.secondaryValue,
301	          tiebreakValue: scoresTable.tiebreakValue,
302	        })
303	        .from(scoresTable)
304	        .where(
305	          and(
306	            eq(scoresTable.id, data.scoreId),
307	            eq(scoresTable.competitionEventId, data.trackWorkoutId),
308	          ),
309	        )
310	        .limit(1)
311	
312	      if (!score) {
313	        throw new Error("Score not found")
314	      }
315	
316	      // Look up the registration for this user in this competition
317	      // so we can scope video submission updates correctly
318	      const [registration] = await db
319	        .select({ id: competitionRegistrationsTable.id })
320	        .from(competitionRegistrationsTable)
321	        .where(
322	          and(
323	            eq(competitionRegistrationsTable.eventId, data.competitionId),
324	            eq(competitionRegistrationsTable.userId, score.userId),
325	          ),
326	        )
327	        .limit(1)
328	
329	      const now = new Date()
330	
331	      if (data.action === "verify") {
332	        await db.transaction(async (tx) => {
333	          await tx
334	            .update(scoresTable)
335	            .set({
336	              verificationStatus: "verified",
337	              verifiedAt: now,
338	              verifiedByUserId: session.userId,
339	              penaltyType: null,
340	              penaltyPercentage: null,
341	              noRepCount: null,
342	              updatedAt: now,
343	            })
344	            .where(eq(scoresTable.id, data.scoreId))
345

997	                  ? { ms: timeCapMs, secondaryValue }
998	                  : undefined,
999	              tiebreak:
1000	                tiebreakValue !== null && trackWorkout.tiebreakScheme
1001	                  ? {
1002	                      scheme: trackWorkout.tiebreakScheme as "time" | "reps",
1003	                      value: tiebreakValue,
1004	                    }
1005	                  : undefined,
1006	            })
1007	          : null
1008	
1009	      const now = new Date()
1010	
1011	      const newScoreId = await db.transaction(async (tx) => {
1012	        // Re-check inside the transaction to narrow the TOCTOU window from
1013	        // the pre-transaction existence check above. A duplicate-key error
1014	        // from the unique index is still possible under concurrent inserts
1015	        // and is caught below to surface the same friendly message.
1016	        const [existingInTx] = await tx
1017	          .select({ id: scoresTable.id })
1018	          .from(scoresTable)
1019	          .where(
1020	            and(
1021	              eq(scoresTable.competitionEventId, data.trackWorkoutId),
1022	              eq(scoresTable.userId, scoreUserId),
1023	            ),
1024	          )
1025	          .limit(1)
1026	
1027	        if (existingInTx) {
1028	          throw new Error(
1029	            "A score already exists for this submission. Use the adjust action to change it.",
1030	          )
1031	        }
1032	
1033	        const insertValues: typeof scoresTable.$inferInsert = {
1034	          userId: scoreUserId,
1035	          teamId: ownerTeamId,
1036	          workoutId: trackWorkout.workoutId,
1037	          competitionEventId: data.trackWorkoutId,
1038	          scheme,
1039	          scoreType: resolvedScoreType,
1040	          scoreValue: encodedValue,
1041	          status,
1042	          statusOrder: status === "cap" ? 1 : 0,
1043	          sortKey: sortKey ? sortKeyToString(sortKey) : null,
1044	          tiebreakScheme:
1045	            (trackWorkout.tiebreakScheme as TiebreakScheme | null) ?? null,
1046	          tiebreakValue,
1047	          timeCapMs,
1048	          secondaryValue,
1049	          scalingLevelId: registration.divisionId,
1050	          asRx: true,
1051	          recordedAt: now,
1052	          verificationStatus: "adjusted",
1053	          verifiedAt: now,
1054	          verifiedByUserId: session.userId,
1055	          noRepCount: data.noRepCount ?? null,
1056	        }
1057	        await tx.insert(scoresTable).values(insertValues)
1058	
1059	        // The id is generated by `$defaultFn(createScoreId)` so re-fetch it
1060	        // by the natural key (user + event). The pre-insert "no existing
1061	        // score" check above guarantees this lookup returns the row we just
1062	        // wrote rather than a stale one.
1063	        const [inserted] = await tx
1064	          .select({ id: scoresTable.id })
1065	          .from(scoresTable)
1066	          .where(
1067	            and(
1068	              eq(scoresTable.competitionEventId, data.trackWorkoutId),
1069	              eq(scoresTable.userId, scoreUserId),
1070	            ),
1071	          )
1072	          .limit(1)
1073	
1074	        if (!inserted) {
1075	          throw new Error("Failed to fetch inserted score")
1076	        }
1077	
1078	        const insertedId = inserted.id
1079	
1080	        if (encodedRounds.length > 0 && data.roundScores) {
1081	          await tx.insert(scoreRoundsTable).values(
1082	            data.roundScores.map((round, index) => ({
1083	              scoreId: insertedId,
1084	              roundNumber: round.roundNumber,
1085	              value: encodedRounds[index] ?? 0,
1086	              status: roundStatuses[index] ?? null,
1087	            })),
1088	          )
1089	        }
1090	
1091	        await tx.insert(scoreVerificationLogsTable).values({
1092	          scoreId: insertedId,
1093	          competitionId: data.competitionId,
1094	          trackWorkoutId: data.trackWorkoutId,
1095	          athleteUserId: scoreUserId,
1096	          // First-time entry uses the "adjusted" action with null original
1097	          // values so the audit trail still distinguishes it from a real edit.
1098	          action: "adjusted",
1099	          originalScoreValue: null,
1100	          originalStatus: null,
1101	          originalSecondaryValue: null,
1102	          originalTiebreakValue: null,
1103	          newScoreValue: encodedValue,
1104	          newStatus: status,
1105	          newSecondaryValue: secondaryValue,
1106	          newTiebreakValue: tiebreakValue,
1107	          noRepCount: data.noRepCount ?? null,
1108	          performedByUserId: session.userId,
1109	          performedAt: now,
1110	        })
1111	
1112	        await tx
1113	          .update(videoSubmissionsTable)
1114	          .set({
1115	            reviewStatus: "adjusted",
1116	            statusUpdatedAt: now,
1117	            reviewedAt: now,
1118	            reviewedBy: session.userId,
1119	            reviewerNotes: data.reviewerNotes || null,
1120	          })
1121	          .where(
1122	            and(
1123	              eq(videoSubmissionsTable.registrationId, registration.id),
1124	              eq(videoSubmissionsTable.trackWorkoutId, data.trackWorkoutId),
1125	            ),
1126	          )
1127	
1128	        return insertedId
1129	      }).catch((err: unknown) => {
1130	        // The `idx_scores_competition_user_unique` unique index catches
1131	        // concurrent inserts that slip past the SELECT checks — rethrow
1132	        // the friendly message so the caller sees a consistent error.
1133	        if (
1134	          err instanceof Error &&
1135	          err.message.includes("Duplicate entry") &&
1136	          err.message.includes("idx_scores_competition_user_unique")
1137	        ) {
1138	          throw new Error(
1139	            "A score already exists for this submission. Use the adjust action to change it.",
1140	          )
1141	        }
1142	        throw err
1143	      })
1144	
1145	      logInfo({
1146	        message: "[Score] Organizer entered initial score for missing submission",
1147	        attributes: {
1148	          scoreId: newScoreId,
1149	          competitionId: data.competitionId,
1150	          trackWorkoutId: data.trackWorkoutId,
1151	          videoSubmissionId: data.videoSubmissionId,
1152	          performedByUserId: session.userId,
1153	          status,
1154	          encodedValue,
1155	        },
1156	      })
1157	
1158	      return { success: true, scoreId: newScoreId }
1159	    },
1160	  )

1408	/**
1409	 * Get all submissions for an event (for navigation and list view)
1410	 */
1411	export const getEventSubmissionsFn = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
1412	  .inputValidator((data: unknown) => getEventSubmissionsInputSchema.parse(data))
1413	  .handler(async ({ data }): Promise<{ submissions: SubmissionListItem[] }> => {
1414	    const db = getDb()
1415	
1416	    const session = await getSessionFromCookie()
1417	    if (!session?.userId) {
1418	      throw new Error("Not authenticated")
1419	    }
1420	
1421	    await requireSubmissionReviewAccess(data.competitionId)
1422	
1423	    // Verify the event belongs to this competition
1424	    await verifyEventBelongsToCompetition(
1425	      db,
1426	      data.competitionId,
1427	      data.trackWorkoutId,
1428	    )
1429	
1430	    // Get all scores for this event
1431	    const scores = await db
1432	      .select({
1433	        id: scoresTable.id,
1434	        userId: scoresTable.userId,
1435	        scoreValue: scoresTable.scoreValue,
1436	        status: scoresTable.status,
1437	        scheme: scoresTable.scheme,
1438	        scalingLevelId: scoresTable.scalingLevelId,
1439	        verificationStatus: scoresTable.verificationStatus,
1440	      })
1441	      .from(scoresTable)
1442	      .where(eq(scoresTable.competitionEventId, data.trackWorkoutId))
1443	
1444	    if (scores.length === 0) {
1445	      return { submissions: [] }
1446	    }
1447	
1448	    // Get user info for all scores
1449	    const userIds = scores.map((s) => s.userId)
1450	    const users = await autochunk({ items: userIds }, async (chunk) =>
1451	      db
1452	        .select({
1453	          id: userTable.id,
1454	          firstName: userTable.firstName,
1455	          lastName: userTable.lastName,
1456	        })
1457	        .from(userTable)
1458	        .where(inArray(userTable.id, chunk)),
1459	    )
1460	    const userMap = new Map(users.map((u) => [u.id, u]))
1461	
1462	    // Get division info for all scores
1463	    const divisionIds = scores
1464	      .map((s) => s.scalingLevelId)
1465	      .filter((id): id is string => id !== null)
1466	    const divisions =
1467	      divisionIds.length > 0
1468	        ? await autochunk({ items: [...new Set(divisionIds)] }, async (chunk) =>
1469	            db
1470	              .select({
1471	                id: scalingLevelsTable.id,
1472	                label: scalingLevelsTable.label,
1473	              })
1474	              .from(scalingLevelsTable)
1475	              .where(inArray(scalingLevelsTable.id, chunk)),
1476	          )
1477	        : []
1478	    const divisionMap = new Map(divisions.map((d) => [d.id, d]))
1479	
1480	    // Get registration info (for team names)
1481	    const registrations = await autochunk({ items: userIds }, async (chunk) =>
1482	      db
1483	        .select({
1484	          userId: competitionRegistrationsTable.userId,
1485	          teamName: competitionRegistrationsTable.teamName,
1486	        })
1487	        .from(competitionRegistrationsTable)
1488	        .where(
1489	          and(
1490	            eq(competitionRegistrationsTable.eventId, data.competitionId),
1491	            inArray(competitionRegistrationsTable.userId, chunk),
1492	          ),
1493	        ),
1494	    )
1495	    const registrationMap = new Map(registrations.map((r) => [r.userId, r]))
1496	
1497	    // Get video submissions for this event
1498	    const videoSubmissions = await db
1499	      .select({ userId: videoSubmissionsTable.userId })
1500	      .from(videoSubmissionsTable)
1501	      .where(eq(videoSubmissionsTable.trackWorkoutId, data.trackWorkoutId))
1502	    const usersWithVideo = new Set(videoSubmissions.map((vs) => vs.userId))
1503	
1504	    // Build submission list
1505	    const submissions: SubmissionListItem[] = scores.map((score) => {
1506	      const user = userMap.get(score.userId)
1507	      const division = score.scalingLevelId
1508	        ? divisionMap.get(score.scalingLevelId)
1509	        : null
1510	      const registration = registrationMap.get(score.userId)
1511	
1512	      // Decode score for display
1513	      let scoreDisplay = ""
1514	      if (score.scoreValue !== null) {
1515	        scoreDisplay = decodeScore(
1516	          score.scoreValue,
1517	          score.scheme as WorkoutScheme,
1518	          { compact: true },
1519	        )
1520	      }
1521	
1522	      // Derive status from verificationStatus
1523	      const reviewStatus =
1524	        score.verificationStatus === "verified" ||
1525	        score.verificationStatus === "adjusted" ||
1526	        score.verificationStatus === "invalid"
1527	          ? "reviewed"
1528	          : "pending"
1529	
1530	      return {
1531	        id: score.id,
1532	        athleteName: user
1533	          ? `${user.firstName || ""} ${user.lastName || ""}`.trim() || "Unknown"
1534	          : "Unknown",
1535	        teamName: registration?.teamName ?? null,
1536	        divisionLabel: division?.label ?? "Open",
1537	        hasVideo: usersWithVideo.has(score.userId),
1538	        scoreDisplay,
1539	        status: reviewStatus,
1540	      }
1541	    })
1542	
1543	    // Sort by athlete name
1544	    submissions.sort((a, b) => a.athleteName.localeCompare(b.athleteName))
1545	
1546	    return { submissions }
1547	  })

1549	/**
1550	 * Get event details for verification page header
1551	 */
1552	export const getEventDetailsForVerificationFn = createServerFn({
1553	  method: "GET",
1554	})
1555	  .inputValidator((data: unknown) =>
1556	    getEventDetailsForVerificationInputSchema.parse(data),
1557	  )
1558	  .handler(async ({ data }): Promise<{ event: EventDetails | null }> => {
1559	    const db = getDb()
1560	
1561	    const session = await getSessionFromCookie()
1562	    if (!session?.userId) {
1563	      throw new Error("Not authenticated")
1564	    }
1565	
1566	    await requireSubmissionReviewAccess(data.competitionId)
1567	
1568	    // Verify the event belongs to this competition and get submission window
1569	    let eventWindow: {
1570	      submissionOpensAt: string | null
1571	      submissionClosesAt: string | null
1572	    }
1573	    try {
1574	      eventWindow = await verifyEventBelongsToCompetition(
1575	        db,
1576	        data.competitionId,
1577	        data.trackWorkoutId,
1578	      )
1579	    } catch (error) {
1580	      if (
1581	        error instanceof Error &&
1582	        error.message === "Event not found in this competition"
1583	      ) {
1584	        return { event: null }
1585	      }
1586	      throw error
1587	    }
1588	
1589	    // Get the track workout with workout details
1590	    const [trackWorkout] = await db
1591	      .select({
1592	        id: trackWorkoutsTable.id,
1593	        trackOrder: trackWorkoutsTable.trackOrder,
1594	        workoutId: workouts.id,
1595	        workoutName: workouts.name,
1596	        workoutDescription: workouts.description,
1597	        workoutScheme: workouts.scheme,
1598	        workoutScoreType: workouts.scoreType,
1599	        workoutTimeCap: workouts.timeCap,
1600	        workoutRoundsToScore: workouts.roundsToScore,
1601	        workoutRepsPerRound: workouts.repsPerRound,
1602	        workoutTiebreakScheme: workouts.tiebreakScheme,
1603	      })
1604	      .from(trackWorkoutsTable)
1605	      .innerJoin(workouts, eq(trackWorkoutsTable.workoutId, workouts.id))
1606	      .where(eq(trackWorkoutsTable.id, data.trackWorkoutId))
1607	      .limit(1)
1608	
1609	    if (!trackWorkout) {
1610	      return { event: null }
1611	    }
1612	
1613	    return {
1614	      event: {
1615	        id: trackWorkout.id,
1616	        trackOrder: trackWorkout.trackOrder,
1617	        workout: {
1618	          id: trackWorkout.workoutId,
1619	          name: trackWorkout.workoutName,
1620	          description: trackWorkout.workoutDescription,
1621	          scheme: trackWorkout.workoutScheme,
1622	          scoreType: trackWorkout.workoutScoreType,
1623	          timeCap: trackWorkout.workoutTimeCap,
1624	          roundsToScore: trackWorkout.workoutRoundsToScore,
1625	          repsPerRound: trackWorkout.workoutRepsPerRound,
1626	          tiebreakScheme: trackWorkout.workoutTiebreakScheme,
1627	        },
1628	        submissionWindow: {
1629	          opensAt: eventWindow.submissionOpensAt,
1630	          closesAt: eventWindow.submissionClosesAt,
1631	        },
1632	      },
1633	    }
1634	  })
1635	
1636	/**
1637	 * Get verification audit logs for a score
1638	 */
1639	export const getVerificationLogsFn = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
1640	  .inputValidator((data: unknown) => getVerificationLogsInputSchema.parse(data))
1641	  .handler(async ({ data }): Promise<{ logs: VerificationLogEntry[] }> => {
1642	    const db = getDb()
1643	
1644	    // Verify organizer permission
1645	    await requireSubmissionReviewAccess(data.competitionId)
1646	
1647	    // Get logs for this score, newest first
1648	    const logs = await db
1649	      .select({
1650	        id: scoreVerificationLogsTable.id,
1651	        action: scoreVerificationLogsTable.action,
1652	        performedByUserId: scoreVerificationLogsTable.performedByUserId,
1653	        performedAt: scoreVerificationLogsTable.performedAt,
1654	        originalScoreValue: scoreVerificationLogsTable.originalScoreValue,
1655	        originalStatus: scoreVerificationLogsTable.originalStatus,
1656	        newScoreValue: scoreVerificationLogsTable.newScoreValue,
1657	        newStatus: scoreVerificationLogsTable.newStatus,
1658	        trackWorkoutId: scoreVerificationLogsTable.trackWorkoutId,
1659	        penaltyType: scoreVerificationLogsTable.penaltyType,
1660	        penaltyPercentage: scoreVerificationLogsTable.penaltyPercentage,
1661	        noRepCount: scoreVerificationLogsTable.noRepCount,
1662	      })
1663	      .from(scoreVerificationLogsTable)
1664	      .where(
1665	        and(
1666	          eq(scoreVerificationLogsTable.scoreId, data.scoreId),
1667	          eq(scoreVerificationLogsTable.competitionId, data.competitionId),
1668	        ),
1669	      )
1670	      .orderBy(desc(scoreVerificationLogsTable.performedAt))
1671	
1672	    if (logs.length === 0) {
1673	      return { logs: [] }
1674	    }
1675	
1676	    // Get performer names
1677	    const performerIds = [...new Set(logs.map((l) => l.performedByUserId))]
1678	    const performers = await autochunk({ items: performerIds }, async (chunk) =>
1679	      db
1680	        .select({
1681	          id: userTable.id,
1682	          firstName: userTable.firstName,
1683	          lastName: userTable.lastName,
1684	        })
1685	        .from(userTable)
1686	        .where(inArray(userTable.id, chunk)),
1687	    )
1688	    const performerMap = new Map(performers.map((p) => [p.id, p]))
1689	
1690	    // Get workout scheme for score decoding
1691	    let scheme: string | null = null
1692	    if (logs[0]?.trackWorkoutId) {
1693	      const [tw] = await db
1694	        .select({ scheme: workouts.scheme })
1695	        .from(trackWorkoutsTable)
1696	        .innerJoin(workouts, eq(trackWorkoutsTable.workoutId, workouts.id))
1697	        .where(eq(trackWorkoutsTable.id, logs[0].trackWorkoutId))
1698	        .limit(1)
1699	      scheme = tw?.scheme ?? null
1700	    }
1701	
1702	    return {
1703	      logs: logs.map((log) => {
1704	        const performer = performerMap.get(log.performedByUserId)
1705	        const name = performer
1706	          ? `${performer.firstName || ""} ${performer.lastName || ""}`.trim() ||
1707	            "Unknown"
1708	          : "Unknown"
1709	
1710	        return {
1711	          id: log.id,
1712	          action: log.action,
1713	          performedByName: name,
1714	          performedAt: log.performedAt,
1715	          originalScoreValue: log.originalScoreValue,
1716	          originalStatus: log.originalStatus,
1717	          newScoreValue: log.newScoreValue,
1718	          newStatus: log.newStatus,
1719	          scheme,
1720	          penaltyType: log.penaltyType,
1721	          penaltyPercentage: log.penaltyPercentage,
1722	          noRepCount: log.noRepCount,
1723	        }
1724	      }),
1725	    }
1726	  })
1727	
1728	// ============================================================================
1729	// Delete / Update Verification Log Entries
1730	// ============================================================================
1731	
1732	const deleteVerificationLogInputSchema = z.object({
1733	  logId: z.string().min(1),
1734	  competitionId: z.string().min(1),
1735	})
1736	
1737	const updateVerificationLogInputSchema = z.object({
1738	  logId: z.string().min(1),
1739	  competitionId: z.string().min(1),
1740	  action: z.string().optional(),
1741	  penaltyType: z.enum(["minor", "major"]).nullable().optional(),
1742	  penaltyPercentage: z.number().min(0).max(100).nullable().optional(),
1743	  noRepCount: z.number().int().min(0).nullable().optional(),
1744	})
1745	
1746	/**
1747	 * Delete a verification audit log entry
1748	 */
1749	export const deleteVerificationLogFn = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1750	  .inputValidator((data: unknown) =>
1751	    deleteVerificationLogInputSchema.parse(data),
1752	  )
1753	  .handler(async ({ data }): Promise<{ success: boolean }> => {
1754	    const db = getDb()
1755	
1756	    const session = await getSessionFromCookie()
1757	    if (!session?.userId) {
1758	      throw new Error("Not authenticated")
1759	    }
1760	
1761	    await requireSubmissionReviewAccess(data.competitionId)
1762	
1763	    getEvlog()?.set({
1764	      action: "delete_verification_log",
1765	      verification: { competitionId: data.competitionId, logId: data.logId },
1766	    })
1767	
1768	    // Verify the log entry belongs to this competition
1769	    const [log] = await db
1770	      .select({ id: scoreVerificationLogsTable.id })
1771	      .from(scoreVerificationLogsTable)
1772	      .where(
1773	        and(
1774	          eq(scoreVerificationLogsTable.id, data.logId),
1775	          eq(scoreVerificationLogsTable.competitionId, data.competitionId),
1776	        ),
1777	      )
1778	      .limit(1)
1779	
1780	    if (!log) {
1781	      throw new Error("Log entry not found")
1782	    }
1783	
1784	    await db
1785	      .delete(scoreVerificationLogsTable)
1786	      .where(eq(scoreVerificationLogsTable.id, data.logId))
1787	
1788	    logInfo({
1789	      message: "[Score] Organizer deleted verification log entry",
1790	      attributes: {
1791	        logId: data.logId,
1792	        competitionId: data.competitionId,
1793	        deletedByUserId: session.userId,
1794	      },
1795	    })
1796	
1797	    return { success: true }
1798	  })
1799	
1800	/**
1801	 * Update a verification audit log entry
1802	 */
1803	export const updateVerificationLogFn = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1804	  .inputValidator((data: unknown) =>
1805	    updateVerificationLogInputSchema.parse(data),
1806	  )
1807	  .handler(async ({ data }): Promise<{ success: boolean }> => {
1808	    const db = getDb()
1809	
1810	    const session = await getSessionFromCookie()
1811	    if (!session?.userId) {
1812	      throw new Error("Not authenticated")
1813	    }
1814	
1815	    await requireSubmissionReviewAccess(data.competitionId)
1816	
1817	    getEvlog()?.set({
1818	      action: "update_verification_log",
1819	      verification: { competitionId: data.competitionId, logId: data.logId },
1820	    })
1821	
1822	    // Verify the log entry belongs to this competition and get scoreId + context
1823	    const [log] = await db
1824	      .select({
1825	        id: scoreVerificationLogsTable.id,
1826	        scoreId: scoreVerificationLogsTable.scoreId,
1827	        trackWorkoutId: scoreVerificationLogsTable.trackWorkoutId,
1828	        athleteUserId: scoreVerificationLogsTable.athleteUserId,
1829	        penaltyType: scoreVerificationLogsTable.penaltyType,
1830	      })
1831	      .from(scoreVerificationLogsTable)
1832	      .where(
1833	        and(
1834	          eq(scoreVerificationLogsTable.id, data.logId),
1835	          eq(scoreVerificationLogsTable.competitionId, data.competitionId),
1836	        ),
1837	      )
1838	      .limit(1)
1839	
1840	    if (!log) {
1841	      throw new Error("Log entry not found")
1842	    }
1843	
1844	    const logUpdates: Record<string, unknown> = {}
1845	    if (data.action !== undefined) logUpdates.action = data.action
1846	    if (data.penaltyType !== undefined)
1847	      logUpdates.penaltyType = data.penaltyType
1848	    if (data.penaltyPercentage !== undefined)
1849	      logUpdates.penaltyPercentage = data.penaltyPercentage
1850	    if (data.noRepCount !== undefined) logUpdates.noRepCount = data.noRepCount
1851	
1852	    if (Object.keys(logUpdates).length === 0) {
1853	      return { success: true }
1854	    }
1855	
1856	    // Check if penalty fields changed — need to sync to scoresTable
1857	    const hasPenaltyChange =
1858	      data.penaltyType !== undefined ||
1859	      data.penaltyPercentage !== undefined ||
1860	      data.noRepCount !== undefined
1861	
1862	    // Detect penaltyType flip (null ↔ non-null) for review status update
1863	    const oldPenaltyType = log.penaltyType
1864	    const newPenaltyType =
1865	      data.penaltyType !== undefined ? data.penaltyType : oldPenaltyType
1866	    const penaltyTypeFlipped =
1867	      data.penaltyType !== undefined &&
1868	      Boolean(oldPenaltyType) !== Boolean(newPenaltyType)
1869	
1870	    const now = new Date()
1871	
1872	    await db.transaction(async (tx) => {
1873	      // Update the log entry
1874	      await tx
1875	        .update(scoreVerificationLogsTable)
1876	        .set(logUpdates)
1877	        .where(eq(scoreVerificationLogsTable.id, data.logId))
1878	
1879	      // Sync penalty fields to the denormalized scoresTable columns
1880	      if (hasPenaltyChange) {
1881	        const scoreUpdates: Record<string, unknown> = { updatedAt: now }
1882	        if (data.penaltyType !== undefined)
1883	          scoreUpdates.penaltyType = data.penaltyType
1884	        if (data.penaltyPercentage !== undefined)
1885	          scoreUpdates.penaltyPercentage = data.penaltyPercentage
1886	        if (data.noRepCount !== undefined)
1887	          scoreUpdates.noRepCount = data.noRepCount
1888	
1889	        await tx
1890	          .update(scoresTable)
1891	          .set(scoreUpdates)
1892	          .where(eq(scoresTable.id, log.scoreId))
1893	      }
1894	
1895	      // Update video submission reviewStatus when penaltyType flips
1896	      if (penaltyTypeFlipped && log.trackWorkoutId) {
1897	        const [registration] = await tx
1898	          .select({ id: competitionRegistrationsTable.id })
1899	          .from(competitionRegistrationsTable)
1900	          .where(
1901	            and(
1902	              eq(competitionRegistrationsTable.eventId, data.competitionId),
1903	              eq(competitionRegistrationsTable.userId, log.athleteUserId),
1904	            ),
1905	          )
1906	          .limit(1)
1907	
1908	        if (registration) {
1909	          const videoReviewStatus = newPenaltyType ? "penalized" : "adjusted"
1910	          await tx
1911	            .update(videoSubmissionsTable)
1912	            .set({
1913	              reviewStatus: videoReviewStatus,
1914	              statusUpdatedAt: now,
1915	            })
1916	            .where(
1917	              and(
1918	                eq(videoSubmissionsTable.registrationId, registration.id),
1919	                eq(videoSubmissionsTable.trackWorkoutId, log.trackWorkoutId),
1920	              ),
1921	            )
1922	        }
1923	      }
1924	    })
1925	
1926	    logInfo({
1927	      message: "[Score] Organizer updated verification log entry",
1928	      attributes: {
1929	        logId: data.logId,
1930	        competitionId: data.competitionId,
1931	        updatedByUserId: session.userId,
1932	        updates: logUpdates,
1933	      },
1934	    })
1935	
1936	    return { success: true }
1937	  })

1	/**
2	 * Score formatting: converts Score objects to display strings
3	 */
4	
5	import { decodeScore } from "../decode"
6	import type { FormatOptions, Score, ScoreRound, WorkoutScheme } from "../types"
7	import { formatStatus, isSpecialStatus } from "./status"
8	
9	/**
10	 * Format a complete Score object for display.
11	 *
12	 * @param score - Score object to format
13	 * @param options - Format options
14	 *
15	 * @example
16	 * formatScore({ scheme: "time", scoreType: "min", value: 754567, status: "scored" })
17	 * // → "12:34.567"
18	 *
19	 * formatScore({
20	 *   scheme: "time-with-cap",
21	 *   scoreType: "min",
22	 *   value: null,
23	 *   status: "cap",
24	 *   timeCap: { ms: 900000, secondaryValue: 142 }
25	 * })
26	 * // → "CAP (142 reps)"
27	 *
28	 * formatScore({ scheme: "load", scoreType: "max", value: 102058, status: "scored" },
29	 *             { weightUnit: "lbs", includeUnit: true })
30	 * // → "225 lbs"
31	 */
32	export function formatScore(score: Score, options?: FormatOptions): string {
33	  const showStatus = options?.showStatus ?? true
34	
35	  // Handle special statuses
36	  if (isSpecialStatus(score.status)) {
37	    return formatSpecialStatus(score, options, showStatus)
38	  }
39	
40	  // Normal scored result
41	  if (score.value === null) {
42	    return "N/A"
43	  }
44	
45	  return decodeScore(score.value, score.scheme, options)
46	}
47	
48	/**
49	 * Format scores with special status (cap, dq, withdrawn).
50	 */
51	function formatSpecialStatus(
52	  score: Score,
53	  options?: FormatOptions,
54	  showStatus: boolean = true,
55	): string {
56	  const statusPrefix = showStatus ? formatStatus(score.status) : ""
57	
58	  switch (score.status) {
59	    case "cap": {
60	      // Single-round capped: `timeCap.secondaryValue` holds reps at cap.
61	      if (score.timeCap?.secondaryValue !== undefined) {
62	        const repsFormatted = `${score.timeCap.secondaryValue} reps`
63	        return showStatus ? `${statusPrefix} (${repsFormatted})` : repsFormatted
64	      }
65	      // Multi-round capped: `value` is the summed total across rounds
66	      // (per-round caps enforced separately), so surface it.
67	      if (score.value !== null) {
68	        const decoded = decodeScore(score.value, score.scheme, options)
69	        return showStatus ? `${statusPrefix} (${decoded})` : decoded
70	      }
71	      return statusPrefix || "CAP"
72	    }
73	
74	    case "dq":
75	      return statusPrefix || "DQ"
76	
77	    case "withdrawn":
78	      return statusPrefix || "WD"
79	
80	    default:

1	import {describe, expect, it} from 'vitest'
2	
3	/**
4	 * Unit tests for competition leaderboard tie detection and ranking.
5	 *
6	 * These tests document the EXPECTED behavior for tie scenarios in competition rankings.
7	 * Currently, these tests FAIL because the implementation uses sequential ranking (i+1)
8	 * instead of proper tie-aware ranking.
9	 *
10	 * Expected behavior (Standard 1224 Ranking):
11	 * - Athletes with identical scores get the SAME rank
12	 * - Tied athletes receive the SAME points
13	 * - Next rank SKIPS appropriately (e.g., 1, 1, 3 not 1, 1, 2)
14	 *
15	 * Bug location: apps/wodsmith/src/server/competition-leaderboard.ts
16	 * - Event ranking: lines 372-383
17	 * - Overall ranking: lines 504-509
18	 */
19	
20	/**
21	 * Helper function that implements the EXPECTED tie-aware ranking behavior.
22	 * This is the correct implementation that should replace the buggy sequential ranking.
23	 *
24	 * @param sortedScores - Array of scores already sorted by sortKey, secondaryValue, tiebreakValue
25	 * @returns Array of { rank, points } for each score
26	 */
27	function assignRanksWithTies<
28	  T extends {
29	    sortKey: string | null
30	    secondaryValue: number | null
31	    tiebreakValue: number | null
32	    status: string | null
33	  },
34	>(
35	  sortedScores: T[],
36	  athleteCount: number,
37	  calculatePointsFn: (rank: number, athleteCount: number) => number,
38	): Array<{rank: number; points: number}> {
39	  const results: Array<{rank: number; points: number}> = []
40	  let currentRank = 1
41	
42	  for (let i = 0; i < sortedScores.length; i++) {
43	    const current = sortedScores[i]
44	    if (!current) continue
45	
46	    // Check if this score ties with the previous score
47	    let isTied = false
48	    if (i > 0) {
49	      const prev = sortedScores[i - 1]
50	      if (prev) {
51	        // Two scores are equal when:
52	        // - sortKey matches
53	        // - secondaryValue matches (for capped scores)
54	        // - Either no tiebreak exists OR tiebreakValue matches
55	        const sortKeyMatch = current.sortKey === prev.sortKey
56	        const secondaryMatch = current.secondaryValue === prev.secondaryValue
57	        const tiebreakMatch =
58	          (current.tiebreakValue === null && prev.tiebreakValue === null) ||
59	          current.tiebreakValue === prev.tiebreakValue
60	
61	        isTied = sortKeyMatch && secondaryMatch && tiebreakMatch
62	      }
63	    }
64	
65	    // If not tied with previous, this is a new rank position
66	    if (!isTied) {
67	      currentRank = i + 1 // Skip ranks for previous ties
68	    }
69	
70	    // Calculate points based on the rank (tied athletes get same points)
71	    const points = calculatePointsFn(currentRank, athleteCount)
72	
73	    results.push({rank: currentRank, points})
74	  }
75	
76	  return results
77	}
78	
79	/**
80	 * calculatePoints function from competition-leaderboard.ts (lines 116-154)
81	 * Copied here for testing purposes.
82	 */
83	function calculatePoints(
84	  place: number,
85	  athleteCount: number,
86	  scoringType:
87	    | 'winner_takes_more'
88	    | 'even_spread'
89	    | 'fixed_step' = 'fixed_step',
90	  step = 5,
91	): number {
92	  switch (scoringType) {
93	    case 'winner_takes_more': {
94	      const basePoints = [
95	        100, 85, 75, 67, 60, 54, 49, 45, 41, 38, 35, 32, 30, 28, 26, 24, 22, 20,
96	        18, 16, 14, 12, 10, 8, 6, 4, 2, 1,
97	      ]
98	      if (place <= basePoints.length) {
99	        return basePoints[place - 1] ?? 1
100	      }
101	      return 1
102	    }
103	
104	    case 'even_spread': {
105	      if (athleteCount <= 1) return 100
106	      const stepSize = 100 / (athleteCount - 1)
107	      return Math.max(0, Math.round(100 - (place - 1) * stepSize))
108	    }
109	
110	    case 'fixed_step': {
111	      return Math.max(0, 100 - (place - 1) * step)
112	    }
113	  }
114	}
115	
116	describe('calculatePoints', () => {
117	  describe('fixed_step scoring (default)', () => {
118	    it('should calculate points with default 5-point step', () => {
119	      expect(calculatePoints(1, 10)).toBe(100) // 1st place
120	      expect(calculatePoints(2, 10)).toBe(95) // 2nd place
121	      expect(calculatePoints(3, 10)).toBe(90) // 3rd place
122	      expect(calculatePoints(10, 10)).toBe(55) // 10th place
123	    })
124	
125	    it('should not go below 0 points', () => {
126	      expect(calculatePoints(21, 10)).toBe(0) // 21st place would be -5
127	    })
128	
129	    it('should support custom step sizes', () => {
130	      expect(calculatePoints(1, 10, 'fixed_step', 10)).toBe(100)
131	      expect(calculatePoints(2, 10, 'fixed_step', 10)).toBe(90)
132	      expect(calculatePoints(3, 10, 'fixed_step', 10)).toBe(80)
133	    })
134	  })
135	
136	  describe('winner_takes_more scoring', () => {
137	    it('should give decreasing increments favoring winners', () => {
138	      expect(calculatePoints(1, 10, 'winner_takes_more')).toBe(100)
139	      expect(calculatePoints(2, 10, 'winner_takes_more')).toBe(85) // 15 point gap
140	      expect(calculatePoints(3, 10, 'winner_takes_more')).toBe(75) // 10 point gap
141	      expect(calculatePoints(4, 10, 'winner_takes_more')).toBe(67) // 8 point gap
142	    })
143	
144	    it('should give 1 point for places beyond the array', () => {
145	      expect(calculatePoints(29, 30, 'winner_takes_more')).toBe(1)
146	      expect(calculatePoints(30, 30, 'winner_takes_more')).toBe(1)
147	    })
148	  })
149	
150	  describe('even_spread scoring', () => {

content.content:
1	/**
2	 * Sort key computation for database storage
3	 *
4	 * Sort keys encode status + normalized score into a single BigInt
5	 * for efficient single-column index sorting. Stored as a zero-padded
6	 * string in SQLite, so we are NOT limited to 64 bits.
7	 *
8	 * Structure (123-bit BigInt, stored as 38-char zero-padded string):
9	 * - Bits 122-120: status_order (0-7)
10	 * - Bits 119-80:  primary score value (40 bits, ~1 trillion max)
11	 * - Bits 79-40:   secondary value / inverted reps at cap (40 bits, ~1 trillion max)
12	 * - Bits 39-0:    tiebreak value (40 bits, ~1 trillion max)
13	 *
14	 * All three data segments use the same 40-bit width for simplicity.
15	 * Each handles any realistic score value with massive headroom.
16	 */
17	
18	import { MAX_SCORE_VALUE, STATUS_ORDER } from "../constants"
19	import type { Score, ScoreStatus, SortDirection } from "../types"
20	import { getSortDirection } from "./direction"
21	
22	/** Max value for each 40-bit segment (~1.1 trillion) */
23	const SEGMENT_MAX = 2n ** 40n - 1n
24	
25	/** Bit positions for each segment */
26	const SECONDARY_SHIFT = 40n
27	const PRIMARY_SHIFT = 80n
28	const STATUS_SHIFT = 120n
29	
30	/** Number of non-status bits */
31	const DATA_BITS = 120n
32	
33	/**
34	 * Within the "cap" bucket we bit-pack `cappedRoundCount` into the top 8 bits
35	 * of the 40-bit primary segment so that a score with fewer capped rounds
36	 * always sorts ahead of a score with more, regardless of summed total.
37	 *
38	 * Time-with-cap values are milliseconds (32-bit safe for workouts up to ~49
39	 * days), so the low 32 bits of the primary slot hold the time and the next
40	 * 8 bits hold the capped-round count.
41	 */
42	const CAP_TIME_BITS = 32n
43	const CAP_TIME_MASK = (1n << CAP_TIME_BITS) - 1n
44	const CAP_COUNT_MAX = 255
45	
46	/**
47	 * Compute a sort key for database storage.
48	 *
49	 * The sort key encodes status, score value, secondary value (reps at cap),
50	 * and tiebreak into a single integer for efficient index-based sorting.
51	 *
52	 * @param score - Score object or partial with required fields
53	 *
54	 * @example
55	 * // Time workout (lower is better)
56	 * computeSortKey({ value: 510000, status: "scored", scheme: "time", scoreType: "min" })
57	 * // → encodes status 0 + normalized value
58	 *
59	 * // Capped with secondary value
60	 * computeSortKey({ value: 600000, status: "cap", scheme: "time-with-cap", scoreType: "min",
61	 *   timeCap: { ms: 600000, secondaryValue: 100 } })
62	 * // → encodes status 1 + primary + inverted secondary (higher reps = lower key)
63	 */
64	export function computeSortKey(
65	  score: Pick<Score, "value" | "status" | "scheme" | "scoreType"> &
66	    Partial<
67	      Pick<Score, "timeCap" | "tiebreak" | "cappedRoundCount" | "rounds">
68	    >,
69	): bigint {
70	  const direction = getSortDirection(score.scheme, score.scoreType)
71	
72	  // Extract secondary value (reps at cap) if present
73	  const secondaryValue = score.timeCap?.secondaryValue ?? 0
74	
75	  // Derive capped-round count. Prefer the explicit field; otherwise fall
76	  // back to counting rounds with status "cap" when the full array is
77	  // available. This is the dominant tiebreaker inside the "cap" bucket.
78	  const cappedRoundCount =
79	    score.cappedRoundCount ??
80	    (score.rounds
81	      ? score.rounds.filter((r) => r.status === "cap").length
82	      : 0)
83	
84	  // Extract tiebreak value if present
85	  // For time-based tiebreaks, lower is better (use as-is)
86	  // For reps-based tiebreaks, higher is better (invert)
87	  let tiebreakValue = 0n
88	  if (score.tiebreak) {
89	    const tbDirection = score.tiebreak.scheme === "time" ? "asc" : "desc"
90	    tiebreakValue =
91	      tbDirection === "asc"
92	        ? BigInt(score.tiebreak.value)
93	        : SEGMENT_MAX - BigInt(score.tiebreak.value)
94	  }
95	
96	  return computeSortKeyWithComponents(
97	    score.value,
98	    score.status,
99	    direction,
100	    secondaryValue,
101	    tiebreakValue,
102	    cappedRoundCount,
103	  )
104	}
105	
106	/**
107	 * Compute sort key with all components.
108	 *
109	 * @param value - Primary score value (null for incomplete)
110	 * @param status - Score status
111	 * @param direction - Sort direction for primary value
112	 * @param secondaryValue - Secondary value (reps at cap), higher is better
113	 * @param tiebreakValue - Pre-normalized tiebreak value
114	 * @param cappedRoundCount - Count of individual rounds marked "cap" (used
115	 *   as a dominant tiebreaker within the "cap" status bucket)
116	 */
117	function computeSortKeyWithComponents(
118	  value: number | null,
119	  status: ScoreStatus,
120	  direction: SortDirection,
121	  secondaryValue: number,
122	  tiebreakValue: bigint,
123	  cappedRoundCount: number = 0,
124	): bigint {
125	  const statusBits = BigInt(STATUS_ORDER[status]) << STATUS_SHIFT
126	
127	  // Handle null values - they sort last within their status group
128	  if (value === null) {
129	    return statusBits | MAX_SCORE_VALUE
130	  }
131	
132	  // Normalize primary value based on sort direction
133	  // For ascending (lower is better): use value as-is
134	  // For descending (higher is better): invert so higher values get lower sort keys
135	  let normalizedPrimary =
136	    direction === "asc"
137	      ? BigInt(value) & SEGMENT_MAX
138	      : SEGMENT_MAX - (BigInt(value) & SEGMENT_MAX)
139	
140	  // Cap bucket: bit-pack `cappedRoundCount` above the time value so more
141	  // caps → larger primary → worse sort key, regardless of summed total.
142	  // Only meaningful for "asc" (time-with-cap is always asc) and only when
143	  // time fits in 32 bits (holds up to ~49 days of ms, far beyond any WOD).
144	  if (status === "cap" && direction === "asc" && cappedRoundCount > 0) {
145	    const clampedCount = Math.min(cappedRoundCount, CAP_COUNT_MAX)
146	    const timeBits = normalizedPrimary & CAP_TIME_MASK
147	    normalizedPrimary = (BigInt(clampedCount) << CAP_TIME_BITS) | timeBits
148	  }
149	
150	  // For capped status, secondary value (reps) matters - higher is better, so invert
151	  // For scored status, secondary doesn't matter (use 0)
152	  const normalizedSecondary =
153	    status === "cap" ? SEGMENT_MAX - (BigInt(secondaryValue) & SEGMENT_MAX) : 0n
154	
155	  // Combine: status | primary | secondary | tiebreak
156	  return (
157	    statusBits |
158	    (normalizedPrimary << PRIMARY_SHIFT) |
159	    (normalizedSecondary << SECONDARY_SHIFT) |
160	    (tiebreakValue & SEGMENT_MAX)
161	  )
162	}
163	
164	/**
165	 * Compute sort key with explicit direction (legacy compatibility).
166	 *
167	 * @param value - Score value (null for incomplete)
168	 * @param status - Score status
169	 * @param direction - Sort direction
170	 */
171	export function computeSortKeyWithDirection(
172	  value: number | null,
173	  status: ScoreStatus,
174	  direction: SortDirection,
175	): bigint {
176	  return computeSortKeyWithComponents(value, status, direction, 0, 0n)
177	}
178	
179	/**
180	 * Extract status and approximate value from a sort key.
181	 * Note: Value extraction is lossy — secondary and tiebreak bits are discarded.
182	 *
183	 * @param sortKey - The sort key to decode
184	 * @param direction - The sort direction used when encoding
185	 */
186	export function extractFromSortKey(
187	  sortKey: bigint,
188	  direction: SortDirection,
189	): {
190	  statusOrder: number
191	  value: number | null
192	} {
193	  // Extract status order from top bits
194	  const statusOrder = Number(sortKey >> STATUS_SHIFT)
195	
196	  // Extract all non-status bits to check for null
197	  const allBits = sortKey & ((1n << DATA_BITS) - 1n)
198	
199	  // Check for null (MAX_VALUE indicator)
200	  if (allBits === MAX_SCORE_VALUE) {
201	    return { statusOrder, value: null }
202	  }
203	
204	  // Extract primary value from its segment
205	  const primaryBits = (sortKey >> PRIMARY_SHIFT) & SEGMENT_MAX
206	
207	  // Strip any bit-packed cappedRoundCount so the returned value is the
208	  // original time (ms). Cap packing only happens on the ascending branch
209	  // in the "cap" status bucket.
210	  const timeBits =
211	    statusOrder === STATUS_ORDER.cap && direction === "asc"
212	      ? primaryBits & CAP_TIME_MASK
213	      : primaryBits
214	
215	  // Denormalize the primary value
216	  const value =
217	    direction === "asc"
218	      ? Number(timeBits)
219	      : Number(SEGMENT_MAX - timeBits)
220	
221	  return { statusOrder, value }
222	}
223	
224	/**
225	 * Get the status from a status order number.
226	 */
227	export function statusFromOrder(order: number): ScoreStatus {
228	  const entries = Object.entries(STATUS_ORDER)
229	  for (const [status, statusOrder] of entries) {
230	    if (statusOrder === order) {
231	      return status as ScoreStatus
232	    }
233	  }
234	  return "scored"
235	}
236	
237	/**
238	 * Convert a bigint sort key to a zero-padded string for database storage.
239	 *
240	 * Since SQLite stores sortKey as text, we need zero-padding to ensure
241	 * lexicographic string comparison produces the same ordering as numeric comparison.
242	 *
243	 * A 123-bit value can require up to 38 decimal digits (log10(2^123) ≈ 37.02),
244	 * so we pad to 38 characters to guarantee all possible values fit. In practice,
245	 * the highest status_order is 3 (withdrawn), so the current max is well under
246	 * 37 digits — but padding to 38 provides safety for the full 3-bit status range.
247	 *
248	 * @param sortKey - The bigint sort key to convert
249	 * @returns Zero-padded string representation
250	 *
251	 * @example
252	 * sortKeyToString(510000n) // → "00000000000000000000000000000000510000"
253	 */
254	export function sortKeyToString(sortKey: bigint): string {
255	  return sortKey.toString().padStart(38, "0")
256	}
257

content.text:
Now I have enough context. The root cause:

1. When a submission is marked invalid (line 400-417 in `submission-verification-fns.ts`), the score is set to `scoreValue: 0, status: "scored", verificationStatus: "invalid"`.
2. Public leaderboard filters out invalid scores at fetch — so the bug doesn't show there.
3. **Preview mode** (organizer leaderboard preview) includes invalid scores (`includeInvalid: true`), then at line 1060-1084 in `competition-leaderboard.ts`, it **recomputes** the sortKey using `scoreValue: 0, status: "scored"`. For `time` scheme (ascending), 0ms = fastest = rank 1.

Fix: when `verificationStatus === "invalid"`, route the score through the inactive-score branch as `dnf` so every algorithm applies `statusHandling.dnf` (default `last_place`). Also display "Invalid" instead of "0:00".

content.content:
230	
231	Rendered directly under the Verification Controls / Adjust Score card on [[apps/wodsmith-start/src/routes/compete/$slug/review/$eventId/$submissionId.tsx]] and [[apps/wodsmith-start/src/routes/compete/organizer/$competitionId/events/$eventId/submissions/$submissionId.tsx]], [[apps/wodsmith-start/src/components/compete/organizer-video-links-editor.tsx#OrganizerVideoLinksEditor]] mirrors the partner-video layout from [[apps/wodsmith-start/src/components/compete/video-submission-form.tsx#VideoSubmissionForm]]: it renders `teamSize` slots keyed by `videoIndex` (labeled "Captain" / "Teammate N" for teams, "Video URL" for solo), with existing submissions populated by `videoIndex` and unfilled indexes rendered as blank [[apps/wodsmith-start/src/components/ui/video-url-input.tsx]] fields tagged with a "Not submitted" badge. Save is disabled until the URL is both dirty and validates; on success the component calls `router.invalidate()` so the embedded video player, notes panel, and sibling list refetch. [[apps/wodsmith-start/src/server-fns/video-submission-fns.ts#getSiblingSubmissionsFn]] also returns `teamSize`, `registrationId`, `trackWorkoutId`, and `captainUserId` so the editor has the context it needs to create new rows.
232	
233	Writes go through [[apps/wodsmith-start/src/server-fns/video-submission-fns.ts#updateSubmissionVideoUrlFn]], which accepts either `submissionId` (update existing row) or `registrationId + trackWorkoutId + videoIndex` (insert a new row, attributed to the captain's `userId` to group with the captain's other submissions). It guards with `requireSubmissionReviewAccess`, scopes every write through `competitionRegistrationsTable.eventId` to prevent cross-competition access, and re-checks for an existing slot row before inserting to tolerate a race where another reviewer just created the same slot.
234	
235	### Score Adjustments
236	
237	Reviewers can adjust a submitted score with or without assigning a penalty. Penalty classification is optional on adjust; the score change is the primary action.
238	
239	The Verification Controls card surfaces three top-level actions: Verify, Adjust Score, and Mark Invalid. The Adjust Score form exposes a `Penalty (optional)` radio with None / Minor / Major, defaulting to None. When None is selected the client omits `penaltyType` from [[apps/wodsmith-start/src/server-fns/submission-verification-fns.ts#verifySubmissionScoreFn]], which stores the adjustment with `verificationStatus = "adjusted"`, null penalty fields on `scoresTable`, and sets the video `reviewStatus` to `"adjusted"` rather than `"penalized"`. Minor/Major selections keep the original penalty flow with the denormalized `penaltyType`/`penaltyPercentage` columns populated. Both the organizer surface [[apps/wodsmith-start/src/routes/compete/organizer/$competitionId/events/$eventId/submissions/$submissionId.tsx]] and the volunteer surface [[apps/wodsmith-start/src/routes/compete/$slug/review/$eventId/$submissionId.tsx]] share this form.
240	
241	The adjust inputs mirror the athlete submission form: `parseScore` validates entries and shows a "Parsed as" preview, cap status is derived automatically from parsed time vs `event.workout.timeCap` (no manual Status picker), the reps-at-cap secondary input appears only when the cap is auto-hit, and a tiebreak input renders when `event.workout.tiebreakScheme` is set (POSTed as `tieBreakScore`). Shared input-hint helpers live in [[apps/wodsmith-start/src/components/compete/score-entry-helpers.ts]] so `enter-score-form.tsx` and both review surfaces stay consistent. The "Athlete claimed" readout also appends the decoded tiebreak (`· TB: <value>`) whenever the workout defines a `tiebreakScheme`; when the athlete didn't enter one, the value renders as `—` so reviewers can tell at a glance that the tiebreak was skipped rather than assume none was required.
242	
243	The Adjust Score form's penalty-tiebreak state is seeded from `submission.score.tiebreakValue` (the decoded display string) rather than the empty string, so editing other fields without touching the tiebreak input preserves the existing value. Without that seed, the server would receive `tieBreakScore: undefined`, fail the `if (data.tieBreakScore && score.tiebreakScheme)` truthiness check, and persist `tiebreakValue: null`, silently erasing a previously-entered tiebreak.
244	
245	### Manual Score Entry
246	
247	When an athlete uploads a video without filling in the score field, the sidebar renders [[apps/wodsmith-start/src/components/compete/enter-score-form.tsx#EnterScoreForm]] instead of the placeholder, letting the reviewer create the missing score in one step.
248	
249	The form mirrors the athlete-facing `video-submission-form.tsx` score section — schema-aware `parseScore` validation, single vs multi-round inputs, auto-derived cap status from parsed time vs `timeCap` (no separate status picker), secondary "reps at cap" when the cap is hit, and a tiebreak input when `workout.tiebreakScheme` is set — plus reviewer-specific `reviewerNotes` and optional `noRepCount`. Tiebreak input is validated with `parseScore(tiebreakScheme)` before submit so invalid values surface an inline error instead of being silently dropped by the server's try/catch-around-encode. POSTs to [[apps/wodsmith-start/src/server-fns/submission-verification-fns.ts#enterSubmissionScoreFn]]. The server fn is INSERT-only — it loads the video submission + registration + workout, refuses to overwrite an existing `scoresTable` row for the same `(userId, competitionEventId)`, encodes the score and computes `sortKey`/`statusOrder` using the same helpers as `submitVideoFn`, then in one transaction writes the new `scores` row, the per-round `score_rounds` rows when applicable, an audit-log entry (action `"adjusted"` with null `originalScoreValue` so the trail distinguishes a first-time entry from a real edit), and flips the video submission to `reviewStatus = "adjusted"`. Score ownership follows the same captain-only convention as `submitVideoFn`: `scoresTable.userId` is the registration's `captainUserId ?? userId`, and `teamId` is the workout's track owner.
